channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump's name removed from Kennedy Center
item.description: President Trump's name has been removed from the facade of the John F. Kennedy Memorial Center for the Performing Arts, according to an organization official.

item.title: ‘Sophie of Dundee’ Has Been Vindicated, but It Won’t Change Anything in Britain
item.description: The Scottish girl with the hatchet was correct, while her critics were mistaken. Yet no apologies will come from the British elite.

item.title: The Double Standard of Guilt by Association
item.description: Prominent figures have faced consequences for ties to Epstein, while Democratic candidates’ past associations are seemingly off-limits.

item.title: A Crisis in Civic Education
item.description: Nearly a third of U.S. students have below basic civics knowledge. Parents should find this deeply unsatisfying.
